about.bio.1: My drive spans every dimension of the problems I work on. Whether analyzing SMB user behavior, prototyping a complex workflow interaction, or building systems that scale across an entire product organization — my mind is always solving. Gaps in my knowledge don't slow me down; they push me toward mastery.
about.bio.2: Ultimately, it's my ability to translate design decisions into business outcomes — and build teams that do the same — that sets me apart.
about.quote.text: Great design starts with understanding the problem clearly and ends with measurable business outcomes.
about.title: Player-coach. Systems thinker. Outcome-driven.
about.value.0.desc: Every product decision starts with a genuine curiosity about the user's real problem — not the assumed one.
about.value.0.title: Problem-first
about.value.1.desc: The smallest interaction gap compounds into the largest user frustration. Craft and clarity are non-negotiable.
about.value.1.title: Craft-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Translating design rationale into business language for non-design stakeholders is how design earns its strategic seat.
about.value.2.title: Strategic communicator
about.value.3.desc: Design that doesn't ship doesn't matter. Speed, quality, and alignment with engineering drive everything I build.
about.value.3.title: Ships with intent

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of deployment, insights generated by the platform directly informed targeted marketing campaigns and SMB customer engagement strategies that reversed a negative profit trajectory. The business moved from a –17% margin to a +2% margin — demonstrating how thoughtfully applied generative AI, grounded in behavioral design and research principles, can function as a direct business lever rather than a productivity tool.

modal.project.0.outcome.0: Reversed negative profitability — from a –17% operating margin to +2% within four months through behavioral design and targeted SMB engagement.
modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in customer retention and subscription renewals from real, actionable behavioral insights surfaced by the platform.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average cart size and customer lifetime value through more precisely targeted SMB entrepreneur outreach.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced SMB customer acquisition friction — proactively addressing decision-making barriers identified through the AI persona layer.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organizational awareness of SMB customer behavior, empowering ~40 users across sales, customer service, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An AI-assisted persona platform built on live business intelligence data. Combines structured behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights — enabling teams to understand not just who customers are, but how and why they make decisions. Designed as a B2B internal tool serving cross-functional stakeholders.

Within four months, it enabled more precise targeting and smarter interactions that helped move our operating margin from –17% to +2%, while strengthening customer trust and long-term engagement.

modal.project.0.title: AI Persona Agent
modal.project.1.challenge: I architected and led delivery of a comprehensive design system to modernize a fragmented B2B SaaS platform spanning marketing, sales, SMB-facing portals, and internal communications tools. The goal was not only visual renewal, but a durable system improving consistency, scalability, and execution speed — aligning design decisions with business outcomes and establishing design QA as a standard part of delivery.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in Time to Deliver
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers Impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More Design Deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer Hours Saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Unified visual language and component library across all product surfaces — eliminated inconsistencies between designers, engineers, and teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: Shared source of truth in Figma referenced directly in Contentful CMS — clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations for all design artifacts.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Design QA process established — ensuring what ships matches what was designed, sprint after sprint.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and autonomy of designers through clear, repeatable patterns — less direction required, faster output.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Executive trust earned through visible, consistent standards referenced across deliverables org-wide — design as strategic function.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in Contentful, enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a shared source of truth. Adoption at 60–90% org-wide materially improved delivery speed, design quality, and team confidence — transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic capability.

modal.project.1.quote.text: This system changed how we work. Delivery time cut by roughly 50%. Visual and interaction quality jumped by about 80%. We went from weeks assembling concepts to delivering clean, standardized prototypes in days. It raised the bar for every project.

modal.project.1.title: Design System Architect
modal.project.2.challenge: Defining the experience strategy and interaction design for a new SMB membership join flow. The core challenge is twofold: making it genuinely easy for new members to join in compliance with company requirements, and ensuring prospective members clearly understand the value of both the products and the business opportunity — without confusion, friction, or mistrust at the most critical conversion point.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn ↓
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified membership value proposition — reducing hesitation and confusion at tier selection for SMB entrepreneurs.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in cart and checkout through clearer expectations and guided success states.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led membership activation as a first-class experience rather than an optional afterthought.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for SMB members advancing toward entrepreneurial participation and business sharing.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable join and advancement framework aligned with long-term retention and growth.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes membership as a guided progression rather than a transactional gate — aligning interaction design, information architecture, and subscription mechanics across landing pages, cart, and checkout. The experience encourages first-time SMB visitors to join with a product subscription and confidently move toward sharing the business. The result is a scalable foundation improving conversion, reducing abandonment at critical moments, and supporting sustainable growth.

modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the membership journey and aligning it with subscription-based product engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of conversion. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher subscription attachment at join, and improved confidence.

modal.project.2.title: Membership Join Experience
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end refactoring of cart and checkout for a high-growth B2B SaaS platform facing critical revenue leakage from extreme abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining SMB user trust and checkout flows diverging significantly from modern product standards positioned this as a business recovery initiative — not a visual refresh.

modal.project.4.kpi.1.label: Less Abandonment

modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven cart experience addressing SMB user uncertainty at the point of purchase.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced cognitive load in checkout flows through elimination of unnecessary steps and interaction ambiguity.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Subscriptions enabled as a first-class action directly within the cart — not an afterthought.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern B2B SaaS UX standards, closing the gap with top-performing competitors.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Growth in revenue, retention, and trust metrics through isolated, measurable UI improvements validated through A/B testing.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring SMB user trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors directly within the cart experience — including subscriptions, upsell, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led roadmap aligning interaction decisions with business outcomes.

modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and interaction design for a new sitewide intelligent search component to address a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing SMB users to rely on external search engines to find products — directly undermining conversion and member confidence in the platform.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: Smart Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Accuracy in SERP
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Growth
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore SMB user trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results in the most visible positions.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results — rather than failing silently and losing the user.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and checkout through intelligent product recommendations and upsell logic embedded in search results.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and business resources into a single, coherent interaction experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic SMB user tool and growth lever supporting subscriptions, membership, and retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core product experience layer — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer, the new system delivers exact, high-confidence results, guides users when intent is unclear, and surfaces recommendations accelerating cart, checkout, subscription, and membership actions for SMB users.
